title: SRL Diagnostics Global Group is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: SRL Diagnostics Global Group is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
SRL Diagnostics Global Group has an exciting opening for a Consultant Physician at our Ghaziabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About SRL Diagnostics Global Group:
SRL Diagnostics Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SRL Diagnostics Global Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
